source: GA4 property 250338585, last 7 days, utm_content split (lp_a/lp_b)
note: A/B landing-page experiments. Performance refreshed weekly by Polly. UI reads top-level `experiments`; extra metadata (aggregate_7d, built_not_yet_live) is preserved for future UI surfaces.

experiments.name: Big Box LP — Headline & Hero (EN)
experiments.hypothesis: Variant B (price-anchored CTA 'Get Your Box · From €39.95', single Big Box hero, prominent stats, scrolling reviews, FAQ) converts better than Variant A (carousel of all 3 products, 'Choose Your Adventure' CTA).
experiments.polly_note: B leads this week (0.65% vs 0.38% on all-language aggregate; 19 vs 11 transactions). BUT the prior 7d window had A ahead — the swing means we are NOT yet at statistical significance (need ~100 conversions/variant; we have 11-19). KEEP RUNNING 2-3 more weeks before declaring a winner. No action to change variants yet.

experiments.name: Localized LP variants (IT / FR / DE)
experiments.hypothesis: Translated A/B variants would convert non-EN paid traffic at rates comparable to EN.
experiments.polly_note: RED FLAG. IT is the single biggest traffic source (~1,430 sessions/wk, 41% of LP traffic) yet converts at ~0.07%. FR and DE also near-zero. EN converts ~0.65%. The failure is consistent across ALL non-EN locales regardless of A/B copy — that rules out the landing-page copy as the cause. Root cause is structural, not creative: most likely (a) checkout/currency/shipping friction in those locales, (b) low-intent or low-quality paid traffic from the IT/FR/DE ad sets, or (c) the GA4 currency bug masking real non-EN purchases. RECOMMENDATION: do NOT iterate on translations yet. First diagnose checkout in IT/FR/DE (place a test order each), then audit ad-set quality (CTR, audience) in Meta. If checkout is fine and traffic is junk, PAUSE IT/FR/DE paid spend — it is bleeding budget at ~0% return.

built_not_yet_live.name: V3 (bundle widget + UGC reel + FB comment proof)
built_not_yet_live.note: Ready to promote to a live A/B vs B once current test concludes. Tests bundle-driven AOV hypothesis — distinct from current copy test.

built_not_yet_live.name: Try the Game (interactive 3-phase playable demo)
built_not_yet_live.note: Play-before-you-pay hook. Candidate for its own dedicated LP + Meta test.
